purpose: Track the subtraction move for pre-existing register findings outside the README, learning, and reference proof case.

rules.resolution: Move each page's primary action and proof into its first 15 lines. Move secondary setup behind a link.
Name the actor and concrete verb during the next whole-document pass. Keep technical terms that carry the fact.
Add a short sentence beat or combine claims that share one receipt.
Keep authority claims in the deterministic-seam or security page and replace copies with links.
Replace self-narration with the consequence for the reader.
State the coverage claim directly or delete it.
